div.class: d-flex flex-wrap align-items-start justify-content-between gap-3 w-100

div.div: Section 4 Public Hearing Date / धारा 4 सार्वजनिक सुनवाई दिनांक
विगत तीन वर्षों का औसत बिक्री छांट दर *
Urban Body Type / नगरीय निकाय प्रकार

field.name: urban_body_type
field.placeholder: Select body type for slab calculation…

div.span: Signed Award Upload / हस्ताक्षरित अवार्ड अपलोड

button.name: action_download_land_award
button.title: Download Land Award
button.confirm: Do you want to download the Land Award now? Next popup will ask you to choose PDF or Excel.

button.name: action_refresh_land_lines_debug
button.title: Pull all surveys again for selected project and village

button.name: action_clear_khasra_filter
button.title: Clear filter and show all khasras

button.name: action_generate_land_award
button.confirm: Do you want to create the Land Award for this project and village? Please note: this generation will be treated as final and cannot be edited later.

button.name: action_download_land_award
button.confirm: Do you want to download the Land Award now? Next popup will ask you to choose PDF or Excel.

button.name: action_regenerate_land_award
button.confirm: Do you want to regenerate the Land Award? This will also reset Consolidated and R&R awards and delete their cached PDF/Excel files from DB. You must regenerate those two again.

button.name: action_download_tree_award
button.title: Download Tree Award
button.confirm: Do you want to download the Tree Award now? Next popup will ask you to choose PDF or Excel.

field.name: tree_khasra_filter
field.placeholder: Search by khasra to edit tree details...

button.name: action_apply_tree_khasra_search
button.title: Open popup to edit/add/remove trees for matching khasra

button.name: action_generate_tree_award
button.confirm: Do you want to create the Tree Award for this project and village? Please note: this generation will be treated as final and cannot be edited later.

button.name: action_download_tree_award
button.confirm: Do you want to download the Tree Award now? Next popup will ask you to choose PDF or Excel.

button.name: action_regenerate_tree_award
button.confirm: Do you want to regenerate the Tree Award? This will also reset Consolidated and R&R awards and delete their cached PDF/Excel files from DB. You must regenerate those two again.

button.name: action_download_asset_award
button.title: Download Asset Award
button.confirm: Do you want to download the Asset Award now? Next popup will ask you to choose PDF or Excel.

button.name: action_generate_asset_award
button.confirm: Do you want to create the Asset Award for this project and village? Please note: this generation will be treated as final and cannot be edited later.

button.name: action_download_asset_award
button.confirm: Do you want to download the Asset Award now? Next popup will ask you to choose PDF or Excel.

button.name: action_regenerate_asset_award
button.confirm: Do you want to regenerate the Asset Award? This will also reset Consolidated and R&R awards and delete their cached PDF/Excel files from DB. You must regenerate those two again.

button.name: action_download_consolidated_full_award
button.title: Download Consolidated Award
button.confirm: Do you want to download Consolidated Award now? Next popup will ask PDF or Excel.

button.name: action_generate_consolidated_award
button.confirm: Do you want to generate Consolidated Award now? This will build and cache PDF and Excel in database.

button.name: action_download_consolidated_full_award
button.confirm: Do you want to download Consolidated Award now? Next popup will ask PDF or Excel.

button.name: action_generate_consolidated_award
button.confirm: Do you want to regenerate Consolidated Award? Existing cached files will be replaced.

details.p: Consolidated Award will be generated and stored in DB cache (PDF + Excel), then downloaded from cached links.

button.name: action_download_rr_full_award
button.title: Download R&R Award
button.confirm: Do you want to download R&R Award now? Next popup will ask PDF or Excel.

button.name: action_generate_rr_award
button.confirm: Do you want to generate R&R Award now? This will build and cache PDF and Excel in database.

button.name: action_download_rr_full_award
button.confirm: Do you want to download R&R Award now? Next popup will ask PDF or Excel.

button.name: action_generate_rr_award
button.confirm: Do you want to regenerate R&R Award? Existing cached files will be replaced.

details.p: R&R Award will be generated and stored in DB cache (PDF + Excel), then downloaded from cached links.

div.div: Full Award Options (after all sections generated)

button.name: action_generate_award
button.confirm: Do you want to create the full Award (Land + Tree + Asset) for this project and village? Please note: this generation will be treated as final and cannot be edited later.

button.name: action_download_standard_full_award
button.confirm: Do you want to download the full Standard Award now? Next popup will ask you to choose PDF or Excel.

div.p: First generate each section (Land + Tree + Asset). After that, full Standard/Consolidated/R&R downloads will unlock.
Full award downloads are ready in both PDF and Excel.
